mapper.select:
SELECT id, param_code, param_name, param_value, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM sys_param WHERE is_deleted = FALSE
AND ( param_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%') OR param_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%') )
AND status = #{request.status}
ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, param_code, param_name, param_value, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM sys_param WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, param_code, param_name, param_value, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted FROM sys_param WHERE param_code = #{paramCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_param SET param_name = #{paramName}, param_value = #{paramValue}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
